ground.cypher:
MATCH
    p1 = (q:Question {title: 'How to build a Cypher query?'})-[r1:TAGGED]->(tag1:Tag {name: 'cypher'}),
    p2 = (q)-[r2:ASKED]->(u:User),
    p3 = (u)-[r3:PROVIDED]->(a:Answer {title: 'Best practices for Cypher queries'}),
    p4 = (a)-[r4:ANSWERED]->(q2:Question {uuid: q.uuid + 1})
RETURN
    p1, p2, p3, p4
WHERE q.uuid = 12345 AND tag1.link = 'https://example.com/cypher-tags'
ground.question: How does the accepted answer to question 12345, titled "How to build a Cypher query?", relate to the follow-up question "Best practices for Cypher queries," and which tags were used in the original query?

cypher: MATCH (q1:Question {title: "How to build a Cypher query?"})-[:ANSWERED]->(a1:Answer {link: "12345"}),       (q2:Question {title: "Best practices for Cypher queries"}),       (q1)-[:TAGGED]->(t:Tag)\nRETURN a1, q2, collect(t.name) AS Tags
